creator: kristinacors
caption: Like this aesthetic? Shop my 7 day NYC Holiday Itinerary for your trip which includes: 🎄 4 stunning, aesthetic spots to visit each day (So 28 hand picked spots in total…some took me years to find) 📍 Mapped by neighborhood so you’re never zig-zagging across the city 🚶‍♀️ All within 25 minutes walking distance (or a quick car ride) ⏱️ Exact travel times between every stop ✨ Beautiful, photo-worthy locations you won’t find by scrolling TikTok for hours #travelbucketlist #nycluxurylifestyle #nycholidayitinerary #nycweekenditinerary #nycchristmasitinerary
